zh.lifeSummary: 當Bianca Lancia d'agliano於1210年出生在義大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂阿格利亞諾時，她的父親Manfredo Lancia II25歲，母親Costanza Maletta29歲。她於大約1245年與Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年在義大利普格利亞塔朗托享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bianca Lancia d'agliano于1210年出生在意大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂阿格利亞諾时，她的父亲Manfredo Lancia II25岁，母亲Costanza Maletta29岁。她于大约1245年与Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年在意大利普格利亞塔朗托享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'agliano
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Sal, Angelo, Carlo, Guido, Rosario, Carmelo, Domenico, Luigi, Mario, Achille, Antonino, Antonio, Biagio, Carmine.  Spanish Salvador, Diego, Alfonso, Alfredo, Ana, Edgardo, Liborio, Rico.
Italian: habitational name from any of various places so named, derived from the Latin personal name Gallius, for example Gagliano Castelferrato.

nameMeanings.name: Bianca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from bianca ‘white’ (i.e. ‘pure’, but see also Blanche ). The name was used by Shakespeare for characters in two of his plays set in an Italian context: the mild-mannered sister of Katharina, the ‘shrew’ in The Taming of the Shrew, and a courtesan in Othello. It came to prominence in the 1970s as the name of Bianca Jagger , the Nicaraguan fashion model, peace worker, and diplomat, who was for a time married to the rock singer Mick Jagger . Since then it has been used increasingly in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Lancia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Agostino, Mario, Bernardino, Gabriele, Lino, Maurizio, Orlando, Angelo, Claudio, Cosmo, Francesco, Gilda, Giulio, Giuseppe, Nino, Olinto, Santino.
Italian: metonymic occupational name for an armorer or for a soldier who carried a lance, lancia (from Latin lancea).

variants.name: Lanci
meanings: Old French form of the Germanic personal name Lanzo, a short form of various compound names beginning with land ‘land, territory’ ( compare Lambert ), but associated from an early date with Old French lance ‘lance’ (the weapon, from Latin lancea). The modern use as a given name most probably arose as a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name, although it is also commonly taken as a short form of Lancelot .

variants.name: Langella
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alessandro, Annamarie, Carmine, Domenic, Emanuele, Gennaro.
variant of Lancella, from a diminutive of Lancia .

en.lifeSummary: When Bianca Lancia d'agliano was born in 1210, in Agliano, Asti, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Manfredo Lancia II, was 25 and her mother, Costanza Maletta, was 29. She married Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor about 1245. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1246, in Taranto, Puglia, Italy, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bianca Lancia d'agliano est née en 1210, à Agliano, Asti, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Manfredo Lancia II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Costanza Maletta, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor environ 1245. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1246, à Taranto, Puglia, Italie, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bianca Lancia d'agliano 1210 in Agliano, Asti, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Manfredo Lancia II 25 und ihre Mutter Costanza Maletta 29. Sie hat um 1245 Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1246 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Taranto, Puglia, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bianca Lancia d'agliano è nata il nel 1210 nel Agliano, Asti, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Manfredo Lancia II, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Costanza Maletta, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor circa 1245. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1246, nel Taranto, Puglia, Italia, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy: イタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモ
ja.Agliano, Asti, Piemonte, Italien: イタリアピエモントアスティアグリアノ
ja.Gioia Del Colle, Taranto, Puglia, Italy: イタリアプウグリアターアントー
ja.lifeSummary: Bianca Lancia d'aglianoが1210年にイタリアピエモントアスティアグリアノで生まれた時，父Manfredo Lancia IIは25歳，母Costanza Malettaは29歳であった。約1245年にFrederick II Holy Roman Emperorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年にイタリアプウグリアターアントーで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bianca Lancia d'agliano(이)가 1210년 이탈리아 피몽 애스티 아그리아노에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Manfredo Lancia II(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Costanza Maletta(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1245년 Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 이탈리아 푸그리야 태랜토에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bianca Lancia d'agliano nasceu em 1210, em Agliano, Asti, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Manfredo Lancia II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Costanza Maletta, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor aproximadamente 1245. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1246, em Taranto, Puglia, Itália, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bianca Lancia d'agliano родилась в 1210 г. в местности агляно, асти, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Manfredo Lancia II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Costanza Maletta, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor около 1245 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1246 г. в местности таранто, пугля, Италия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bianca Lancia d'agliano nació en 1210, en Agliano, Asti, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Manfredo Lancia II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Costanza Maletta, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor aproximadamente 1245. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1246, en Taranto, Puglia, Italia, a la edad de 36 años.
